meta_title: Vigortrix — Natural Male Supplement for Libido, Confidence & Performance
meta_description: Vigortrix is a natural supplement designed to help men restore libido, improve circulation, boost energy and regain confidence in intimacy. 60-day guarantee.
headline: Don't Let Confidence Issues Steal Your
hero_subtext_1: There's a moment when many men realize something has changed. Energy isn't the same. Desire decreases. The body's response seems slower. And what once was natural starts becoming a worry.
hero_subtext_2: Vigortrix was developed to support men who want to restore libido, improve circulation, have more energy and feel confident in intimacy again.
hero_guarantee_text: Risk-free — full refund if not satisfied within 60 days. No questions asked.
benefits_headline: Why Men Over 40 Struggle With Intimate Performance
benefits_paragraphs: Many men believe that performance issues happen only because of age. But it's often more complex than that. In many cases, the problem can be linked to a combination of factors: weaker circulation, lower energy and vitality, accumulated stress, emotional tension, and physical and mental fatigue.

When intimate performance fails, it can shake something much deeper: masculine confidence. Avoiding intimacy for fear of failing, making excuses not to approach, feeling embarrassed about not responding like before — these situations affect self-esteem and relationships.

Vigortrix changes this. Our formula was developed to support the factors that influence male performance: circulation, libido, energy and confidence. Not just in the moment, but in a comprehensive way.
urgency_text: Save $300 today — but stock is running low. Don't wait.
features_subheadline: Each ingredient chosen for maximum impact on male vitality — backed by science, not hype.

features.title: Horny Goat Weed
features.description: Traditionally used as a natural aphrodisiac, helps support blood flow and intimate response. Can contribute to more firmness and readiness.

features.title: Eurycoma Longifolia
features.description: Also known as Tongkat Ali, is associated with testosterone support, energy and disposition. Can help with male libido and vigor.

features.title: Saw Palmetto
features.description: Known for supporting prostate health and hormonal balance, is a relevant ingredient for men who want to maintain vitality over time.

features.title: Ginkgo Leaf
features.description: Associated with circulation and cognitive support, can collaborate with blood flow and mental clarity.

features.title: Tribulus Terrestris
features.description: Popular ingredient in male formulas for its support of libido, energy and physical performance.

features.title: Korean Ginseng
features.description: Known for supporting energy, endurance and stress adaptation, can help men who feel worn out and without energy.

science_subheadline: Vigortrix was formulated to support three important areas of intimate health and male performance.

science_steps.text: Blood circulation is one of the most important factors for intimate response. The formula ingredients help support this process, which can favor firmer erections and more security in the moment.

The formula was also designed to help men who feel tired, demotivated or with less sexual desire than before. By supporting vitality, disposition and libido, the goal is to help men feel more present and active.

When men feel more supported in their own body, the tendency is to leave the cycle of anxiety, insecurity and frustration. Vigortrix connects with something essential: the recovery of masculine confidence.

science_result: The result: You feel more confident, more present and more secure in intimacy within weeks.
reviews_headline: What Happens When You Take Vigortrix
reviews_subheadline: These are verified reviews from men just like you — who refused to accept confidence issues as inevitable.

reviews.body: I was already avoiding intimacy because the fear of failing was constant. After starting Vigortrix, I felt improvement in performance and, mainly, in confidence. It was a relief to feel more secure again.
reviews.name: Michael Thompson

reviews.body: My libido had dropped a lot and it was affecting my marriage. What I liked most about Vigortrix was noticing that I had more energy and less anxiety. Today I feel much more present.
reviews.name: David Richardson

reviews.body: I had already tried other alternatives and was skeptical. With Vigortrix, I felt a difference in firmness and energy. This really positively affected my self-esteem.
reviews.name: James Wilson

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know Before You Order

faq_items.question: Does Vigortrix really work?
faq_items.answer: Vigortrix is designed to support important factors for male sexual performance, such as circulation, libido, vitality and confidence. Results may vary from person to person, but the formula was developed to work on these foundations.

faq_items.question: Is Vigortrix safe?
faq_items.answer: Vigortrix is presented as a natural formula, manufactured in the United States in a certified facility with quality standards. Still, it's always important to follow the manufacturer's guidelines and seek professional advice if you have any doubts.

faq_items.question: Who can use Vigortrix?
faq_items.answer: Adult men who want to support libido, energy, erection and intimate performance naturally.

faq_items.question: How long before I notice results with Vigortrix?
faq_items.answer: Time may vary according to organism, routine and consistency of use. The most important thing is to use correctly and allow the formula to work progressively.

faq_items.question: Can I use Vigortrix with other supplements?
faq_items.answer: In many cases, men combine supplements daily. Still, it's ideal to talk to a health professional, especially if you already use other products or medications.

faq_items.question: What if Vigortrix doesn't work for me?
faq_items.answer: In that case, the 60-day guarantee helps make the purchase safer and more comfortable. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.

footer_description: Vigortrix is the #1 natural supplement for male vitality and confidence. Made in the USA with premium, naturally sourced ingredients. Our formula is manufactured in a certified facility following strict quality standards.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This Privacy Policy describes how Vigortrix and its authorized distributors collect, use, and protect your personal information. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a safe experience on our website.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us when you place an order, create an account, or contact customer support. This includes your name, email address, shipping address, billing address, phone number, and payment information (processed securely through our payment processors). We also automatically collect certain information when you visit our website through cookies and similar technologies, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages visited, and the dates and times of your visits.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to process and fulfill your orders, provide customer support, send order confirmations and shipping updates, communicate with you about our products and promotions (only with your consent), improve our website and services, prevent fraud and unauthorized transactions, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your data is never shared with advertisers or marketing networks.

sections.heading: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and assist in our marketing efforts. Cookies are small data files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences and understand how you use our site. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may limit your ability to use certain features of our website.

sections.heading: Third-Party Service Providers
sections.content: We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, and fulfilling your orders. These providers include payment processors (to process payments securely), shipping carriers (to deliver your orders), email service providers (to send order updates), and analytics providers (to help us understand website traffic). All such third parties are contractually obligated to keep your information confidential and secure.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All payment transactions are encrypted using SSL (Secure Socket Layer) technology. We use industry-standard security protocols and regularly review our security practices to ensure your data remains protected. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: Your Rights Under GDPR
sections.content: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA) or United Kingdom, you have certain rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and UK Data Protection Act. These include the right to access your personal data, the right to rectification, the right to erasure ('right to be forgotten'), the right to restrict processing, the right to data portability, and the right to object to processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in the Contact section.

sections.heading: Your Rights Under CCPA
sections.content: If you are a California resident, you have specific rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). These include the right to know what personal information we collect and how we use it, the right to delete your personal information, the right to opt-out of the sale of your information (we do not sell your personal information), and the right to non-discrimination for exercising your rights. To exercise these rights, please contact us.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which we collected it, including for the purposes of satisfying any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. When your personal information is no longer required, we securely delete or anonymize it. Order-related data may be retained for tax and accounting purposes for up to 7 years.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our website and products are not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information without parental consent, please contact us immediately. If we discover that we have collected information from a child without parental consent, we will delete that information promptly.

sections.heading: Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will post any changes on this page and update the 'Last updated' date at the top of the policy. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information. Your continued use of our website after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at support@vigortrix.com. We respond to all inquiries within 1-2 business days. For data protection concerns, you may also contact your local data protection authority.

modals.title: Terms of Service
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. By accessing this website and purchasing any products, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read these terms carefully before using our website or purchasing our products.

sections.heading: Independent Distributor Notice
sections.content: This website is operated by an independent authorized distributor of Vigortrix. We are not the manufacturer, brand owner, or creator of the product. All product names, logos, trademarks, and brand identifiers are the property of their respective owners. This website is not part of, endorsed by, or associated with the official product manufacturer in any way. Individual results from using our products may vary and are not guaranteed.

sections.heading: Age Restriction and Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years of age to purchase from this website. By placing an order, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into a binding contract. If you are under 18, please do not attempt to purchase our products. Parental consent is required for any purchase made by a minor.

sections.heading: Product Description and Intended Use
sections.content: Vigortrix is a dietary supplement designed to support male vitality and wellness in adult men. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. The information provided on this website is for informational purposes only and should not be construed as medical advice. Always consult with a qualified healthcare professional before starting any supplement regimen, especially if you have any pre-existing medical conditions or are taking medications.

sections.heading: No Medical Advice Disclaimer
sections.content: The statements made on this website have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any health condition or disease. Nothing on this website should be considered or construed as medical advice. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay in seeking it because of something you have read on this website.

sections.heading: Order Acceptance and Fulfillment
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason at any time before shipment. This may include limitations on quantities available for purchase, inaccuracies or errors in product or pricing information, or problems identified by our fraud prevention systems. We will contact you if any additional information is required to process your order. In the event of cancellation, any payments processed will be refunded in full.

sections.heading: Pricing and Payment
sections.content: All prices displayed on our website are in US dollars and are subject to change without notice. We make every effort to ensure accurate pricing, but errors may occur. If we discover a pricing error after you place an order, we will notify you immediately and give you the option to cancel your order or proceed with the correct price. Payment is processed securely through our third-party payment processors. By providing payment information, you authorize us to charge the specified amount.

sections.heading: Shipping and Delivery
sections.content: We ship products to addresses within the United States and select international locations. Shipping times are estimates only and do not guarantee delivery by a specific date. We are not responsible for delays caused by shipping carriers, weather conditions, or circumstances beyond our control. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery of the product to the shipping carrier. Please ensure shipping address accuracy, as re-shipments may incur additional charges.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. We do not warrant that our website will be uninterrupted or error-free. In no event shall our liability exceed the purchase price paid for the product(s) in question. We are not responsible for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of your use of our website or products.

sections.heading: No Guarantee of Results
sections.content: Individual results from using Vigortrix may vary significantly. The testimonials and experiences shared on this website are individual experiences and do not constitute guarantees of similar results. What works for one person may not work for another. The product is designed to support overall wellness as part of a healthy lifestyle. We make no promises or guarantees regarding specific outcomes from using our products.

sections.heading: Prohibited Uses
sections.content: You may not use our products for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. You agree not to violate any laws in your jurisdiction regarding the purchase or use of dietary supplements. You may not modify, distribute, transmit, display, perform, reproduce, publish, license, create derivative works from, transfer, or sell any information, software, products, or services obtained from our website without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: Indemnification
sections.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Vigortrix, its authorized distributors, officers, directors, employees, agents, and affiliates from and against any and all claims, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or relating to your use of this website, your violation of these Terms of Service, or your violation of any rights of a third party.

sections.heading: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
sections.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, USA, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any dispute arising from these terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association. By using this website, you expressly waive any right to participate in class action lawsuits or jury trials.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Any changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this website. Your continued use of this website after any such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms. It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically for any changes.

sections.heading: Entire Agreement
sections.content: These Terms of Service, together with our Privacy Policy and any other legal notices published on this website, constitute the entire agreement between you and us regarding your use of this website and purchase of our products. If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full force and effect.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds
modals.intro: We are confident in the quality of Vigortrix and want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. Please read our returns and refunds policy below to understand your rights and how to request a refund if needed.

sections.heading: 60-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: We offer a comprehensive 60-day money-back guarantee on all Vigortrix orders. If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return the product(s) within 60 days from the date of delivery for a full refund. No questions asked. This guarantee applies to all orders, regardless of quantity purchased. To be eligible for a refund, the product must be returned in its original packaging (if possible), though we accept returns even if the packaging has been opened. You do not need to provide a reason for the return.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Refund
sections.content: To request a refund, please contact our customer support team at support@vigortrix.com with your order number. We recommend including your order number in the subject line for faster processing. Our support team will respond within 1-2 business days with return instructions. Please do not return any product without first contacting us, as we may provide a pre-paid return label or specific instructions based on your location.

sections.heading: Return Shipping
sections.content: For US customers: We provide a pre-paid return shipping label for all refund requests. Simply attach the label to your return package and drop it at any authorized shipping location. For international customers: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer. We recommend using a tracked shipping method to ensure your return is received. Please keep your tracking number for your records.

sections.heading: Refund Processing Timeline
sections.content: Once we receive your returned product(s), our team will inspect the package within 3-5 business days. Refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days after inspection. The refund will be credited to the original payment method used for the purchase. Please note that depending on your bank or credit card company, it may take an additional 5-10 business days for the refund to appear in your account. You will receive a confirmation email once the refund has been processed.

sections.heading: Partial Refunds and Partial Returns
sections.content: If you purchased multiple bottles and only wish to return some of them, you may do so. The refund amount will be calculated based on the quantity returned at the original purchase price. For example, if you purchased a 6-bottle kit and return 3 bottles, you will receive a refund for 3 bottles at the discounted kit price. Please contact us for partial return instructions.

sections.heading: Damaged or Defective Products
sections.content: If you receive a damaged or defective product, please contact us immediately (within 7 days of delivery) with photos of the damage. We will ship a replacement product at no additional cost or provide a full refund. Please do not use the damaged product. We apologize for any inconvenience and will make every effort to resolve the issue promptly.

sections.heading: Wrong Item Received
sections.content: If you receive the wrong product, please contact us immediately with your order number and a description of the item you received. We will arrange for the correct product to be shipped to you at no additional cost and provide instructions for returning the incorrect item (with pre-paid shipping). Your satisfaction is our priority.

sections.heading: Non-Refundable Items
sections.content: Shipping and handling fees are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error (wrong item, damaged product, etc.). Original shipping costs will be deducted from refunds for change-of-mind returns. Refunds do not include any customs fees or duties for international orders.

sections.heading: Customer Service Contact
sections.content: Our returns department is available to assist you Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm EST. For fastest service, please email us at support@vigortrix.com with your order number and a brief description of your request. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 1-2 business days and process refunds within the timeframes outlined above.

We prioritize customer satisfaction and strive to resolve all inquiries promptly.

sections.heading: Order Status & Tracking
sections.content: To check your order status or obtain tracking information, please email orders@vigortrix.com with your order number, or call 1-800-555-VIGR. You can also log into your account on our website to view real-time tracking updates. Most orders ship within 1-2 business days.

sections.heading: Returns & Refunds
sections.content: For returns and refund requests, please contact returns@vigortrix.com. We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee on all orders. Our returns team will provide you with a pre-paid return shipping label and guide you through the process. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after we receive your return.

sections.heading: Wholesale & Business Partnerships
sections.content: Interested in carrying Vigortrix in your store or website? We offer competitive wholesale pricing for retailers, gyms, practitioners, and online stores. Contact our partnership team at partners@vigortrix.com with details about your business, and we'll send you our wholesale catalog and pricing.

sections.heading: Media & Press Inquiries
sections.content: For media, press, or influencer inquiries, please contact press@vigortrix.com. We work with select media partners and content creators. Please include your publication, channel reach, and the nature of your inquiry. Our communications team typically responds within 2-3 business days.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.content:
Before contacting us, you may find your answer in our FAQ section on the website. Common topics include:

• Order placement and payment issues
• Shipping times and tracking
• Product ingredients and usage
• Returns and refunds process
• Subscription management

Visit the FAQ section or search our knowledge base for quick answers.

sections.heading: Customer Satisfaction Guarantee
sections.content: Your satisfaction is our top priority. If you have any concerns about your order, product, or experience with Vigortrix, please reach out directly. We are committed to resolving any issues to ensure your complete satisfaction. We value every customer and strive to exceed expectations.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.content: We are committed to ensuring accessibility for all customers. If you require assistance or have accessibility needs, please let us know. We can provide documents in alternative formats and ensure our communications are accessible. Contact us at support@vigortrix.com with your specific needs.
